summary: Comprehensive testing of Stripe payment flow integration for SportsConnect. All backend APIs pass (9/10, 1 skipped). Frontend flow works correctly including event detail price display, registration dialog with race selector, and payment pages.

minor.issue: User cannot register again for a different race on the same event after initial registration - returns 'Already registered'. This is intentional design but limits multi-race registrations.

issues: Commission percentage shows 5% in UI label ('COMMISSION PLATEFORME (5%)') but backend calculates 6%. Minor text inconsistency.

passed_tests: GET /api/events/{event_id} - Returns event with races and prices correctly
POST /api/registrations - Creates registration with race selection and platform fee calculation
POST /api/payments/create-checkout - Creates Stripe checkout session with valid checkout.stripe.com URL
GET /api/admin/stats - Returns total_users, total_events, total_registrations, total_revenue, platform_fees
GET /api/admin/payments - Returns paginated payment transactions list
Admin endpoints blocked for non-admin users (403 Forbidden)
Event detail page shows 'À PARTIR DE 20€' (minimum race price, not base 25€)
Registration dialog shows race selector for events with multiple races
Race selection updates total amount dynamically (10km=20€, 20km=35€, 35km=45€)
CONFIRMER ET PAYER button triggers registration + checkout flow
Checkout session redirects to Stripe checkout URL
Payment success page shows loading state while polling
Payment cancel page renders correctly with navigation buttons
Admin dashboard displays revenue and commission sections
action_items: Optional: Update admin dashboard label from 'COMMISSION PLATEFORME (5%)' to '(6%)' to match backend calculation
critical_code_review_comments: Registration creates checkout session but user cannot try different race without new user - consider allowing multiple races per event
Missing aria-describedby on DialogContent components (accessibility warning)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing event evt_f79c5cfd5036 (COURSE CORSICA FEVER)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe payment integration is working. User pierre@test.com has 2 pending registrations (reg_12256f871e49 for CORSICA FEVER 10km, reg_cf9307db5ad5 for La Grande Boucle). Stripe checkout URLs are real test sessions at checkout.stripe.com. Backend uses emergentintegrations library for Stripe. Platform commission is 6% (PLATFORM_COMMISSION constant in server.py line ~77).

mocked_apis.Stripe: Uses test API key sk_test_emergent - creates real Stripe test checkout sessions
